status_key.surplus: More containers than the market needs. Prices low. Your BUY opportunity.
status_key.deficit: Containers scarce. Prices high. Your SELL opportunity.
status_key.tightening: Was surplus, moving toward deficit — watch this lane.
status_key.disrupted: Significant geopolitical or logistical event affecting normal flows.

notes.data_quality: dwell_days marked 'verified' come from cited public sources in our research. All other figures are directionally correct based on structural trade-flow analysis but are not live quotes. Always verify on Container xChange or BOXXPORT before committing capital.

ports.note: LA Port Optimizer (Signal) confirms 5.7-day dwell. Containers pile up after imports unload — classic US West Coast surplus dynamic.
Sister port to LA. Structural surplus from import volume exceeding export demand.
Largest US East Coast port. Surplus from import dominance similar to West Coast.
Fast-growing East Coast hub benefiting from nearshoring and supply chain diversification.
Key petrochemical and agricultural export hub. More balanced than coastal import ports.
PNW gateway. Surplus conditions, losing some volume to LA/LB and East Coast alternatives.
Europe's largest port. Buyer's market confirmed — surplus conditions in 2025-2026 outlook. Good buy-side port for Europe-to-China repositioning.
Major European hub. Consistent surplus alongside Rotterdam in 2025-2026.
Europe's second-largest container port. Surplus conditions tracking Rotterdam.
UK's largest container port. Post-Brexit trade pattern shifts have left some surplus capacity.
Mediterranean hub serving Southern Europe. More balanced than North Europe ports.
Fast-growing transshipment hub on the Strait of Gibraltar. Gateway between Europe and West Africa.
Middle East mega-hub severely disrupted by Iran conflict forcing carrier rerouting. Prices volatile — avoid without real-time intelligence.
Mumbai gateway. 34% YoY price increase confirmed. Was surplus; now tightening as India's export capacity grows. No longer a clear cheap-buy location.
48% YoY price increase confirmed — fastest-rising port in our dataset. Tightening rapidly.
19% YoY price increase. India's fastest-growing private port. Tightening alongside Nhava Sheva and Chennai.
Key transshipment hub for South Asia. Efficiently run. Serves as relay point between India, Middle East, and East Asia.
Africa's busiest port but chronically congested. Significant surplus — containers sit a long time. Resale is possible but buyer pool is limited.
East Africa's main gateway. High dwell times reflect infrastructure constraints. Niche surplus market.
World's busiest port by volume. Chronic deficit — export demand far outstrips container supply. The archetypal sell-side market.
Rivalling Shanghai for busiest port globally. Consistent equipment deficit driven by massive export volume.
Pearl River Delta export hub. Major deficit port — serving electronics and manufacturing exports to global markets.
Pearl River Delta. Fast-growing port complex. Deficit conditions typical of southern China hubs.
Beijing's sea gateway. Northern China deficit hub. Key for industrial exports.
Major Shandong province export hub. Consistent deficit aligned with China's broader equipment shortage.
World benchmark for port efficiency. Near-zero waiting time confirmed. Major transshipment hub — containers move in and out quickly, keeping the market balanced.
Malaysia's main gateway. Benefiting from manufacturing diversification away from China.
Efficient transshipment hub near Singapore. Gaining volume as shippers diversify.
Consistently records near-zero waiting time. World-class efficiency. Key transshipment hub for Northeast Asia.
Taiwan's main port. Efficient and balanced. Key relay point for trans-Pacific and intra-Asia trade.
Bangladesh's main gateway. Fast-growing garment export sector is tightening equipment availability. Was surplus; watch this lane.
